# HoloDeck Documentation

> AI Agent Experimentation Platform - Define agents in YAML, no code required

HoloDeck is an open-source, no-code platform for building, testing,
and deploying AI agents via YAML. This index points LLMs at the
canonical docs for the CLI, agent schema, backends (Claude / SK),
tools (vectorstore, MCP, hierarchical_document), evaluations,
and the agent server.


## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/getting-started/installation/index.md)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/getting-started/quickstart/index.md)

## Guides

- [Agent Configuration](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/agent-configuration/index.md)
- [LLM Providers](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/llm-providers/index.md)
- [Claude Backend](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/claude-backend/index.md)
- [Semantic Kernel Backend](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/semantic-kernel-backend/index.md)
- [Tools](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/tools/index.md)
- [MCP CLI](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/mcp-cli/index.md)
- [Vector Stores](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/vector-stores/index.md)
- [Evaluations](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/evaluations/index.md)
- [Dashboard](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/dashboard/index.md)
- [Global Configuration](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/global-config/index.md)
- [File References](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/file-references/index.md)
- [Agent Server](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/serve/index.md)
- [Deployment](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/deployment/index.md)
- [Observability](https://docs.useholodeck.ai/guides/observability/index.md)
